heading: Reallocation of funds withheld from countries which fail to take adequate steps to halt illicit drug production or trafficking
label: 2291e Reallocation of funds withheld from countries which fail to take adequate steps to halt illicit drug production or trafficking

Amendments1994— struck out subsec. (a) designation and heading which read “Additional assistance for countries taking significant steps”, substituted “assistance under this chapter” for “security assistance” in provisions before par. (1), “Other assistance” for “Security assistance” in par. (2) heading, and “additional assistance” for “additional security assistance” in par. (2) text, and struck out heading and text of subsec. (b). Text read as follows: “As used in this section, the term ‘security assistance’ means assistance under part II of subchapter II of this chapter (relating to the grant military assistance program), part IV of subchapter II of this chapter (relating to the Economic Support Fund), part V of subchapter II of this chapter (relating to international military education and training), or the Arms Export Control Act (relating to the ‘Foreign Military Financing Program’).”Pub. (b). , substituted “(relating to the ‘Foreign Military Financing Program’)” for “(relating to foreign military sales financing)”.Pub. L. 102–583, § 6(b)(5)(B)

children.heading: International narcotics control assistance
children.label: 1 International narcotics control assistance
children.text: Those funds may be transferred to and consolidated with the funds appropriated to carry out this part in order to provide additional narcotics control assistance for those countries. Funds transferred under this paragraph may only be used to provide increased funding for activities previously justified to the Congress. Transfers may be made under this paragraph without regard to the 20-percent increase limitation contained in . This paragraph does not apply with respect to funds made available for assistance under the Arms Export Control Act [ et seq.].section 2360(a) of this title22 U.S.C. 2751

children.heading: Other assistance
children.label: 2 Other assistance
children.text: Any such funds not used under paragraph (1) shall be reprogrammed within the account for which they were appropriated (subject to the regular reprogramming procedures under ) in order to provide additional assistance for those countries.section 2394–1 of this title
